profile.name: Radek Gryc
profile.tagline: I build client relationships and deliver complex things — on time, across borders.
profile.headline: Account Management · Client Partnerships · EMEA

story.heading: The through-line
story.body: Over 10 years I've managed EMEA-wide retail and POS projects for Calvin Klein, Tommy Hilfiger, Karl Lagerfeld, and Adidas — from complex fixture rollouts to bespoke flagship installations. Then moved into digital immersive experiences at an award-winning XR/AI studio. Same through-line: building environments that make people feel something, and making sure they get delivered.

experience.summary: Leading business development for an award-winning XR/AI studio — pipeline, partnerships, and conference keynotes.
Owned senior client relationships and P&L across retail rollout programs for global fashion brands.
Led the account team delivering EMEA-wide POS and retail programs for Calvin Klein and Tommy Hilfiger.
Scaled complex fixture rollouts across EMEA — from brief to install.
Managed production, suppliers, and installation teams for retail programs across Europe.
Coordinated cross-border logistics for retail fit-outs — foundations of the EMEA playbook.

contact.heading: Let's talk
contact.body: Open to Account Management and Client Partnership roles across EMEA.
